data.v1_genesis: Initial exploration of Neurofunk / Dark Psy hybrid structures. Focus on basic rhythmic coherence.
data.v2_formalization: Introduction of JSON-driven analysis and Semantic Core L1. First use of Hyperloop protocols.
data.v3_geometric_unity: Implementation of MLGS_QUATERNION_GEOMETRIC_UNITY. 4D-panning and spatial soundstage testing.
data.v4_Omega_current: Full integration of ASE (Aesthetic-Singularity-Engine). Ψ_condensation economics and LFE MetaFractal fusion.
